_usage.popup.active_true: Show popup on load (if user has not seen this version)
_usage.popup.version: Change version to show popup again to users who already dismissed it

popup.title: 100 New Words — 900 Total!
popup.message:
We added 100 new basic words on June 25!
Reach 900 words with family, food, animals, verbs, health, tech, sports, and daily expressions.
Basic Words now has 900 words in total.

banner.message: 📚 June 25 update — 100 new words! Now 900 total — health, tech, food & more!
